content:
Desktop APP 2.0.1 (Beta Testing)

Logseq 2.0 Beta (DB version) is here! 🎉

After a long wait, our first Logseq 2.0 beta release is finally here. We know many of you have been looking forward to trying it, and we’re excited to put it in your hands!

This is an early beta, so you may encounter some rough edges. We’d love for you to give it a try and tell us what works, what doesn’t, and what you’d like to see next. Your feedback will help us improve Logseq and shape the stable release.

Before getting started, please take a moment to read these updates:

• Live roadmap

• Big update: Logseq is splitting into two versions

As with any beta, please back up your important data before testing. You can share feedback and report issues through our GitHub issue tracker.

Thank you for your patience, encouragement, and continued support. We’re excited to begin this next chapter with you! ❤️

Desktop app Nightly Release 20260710

Pre-release

This is a nightly release of the Logseq desktop app.

It's unstable compared to the official releases, use it with caution!

Desktop/Android APP 0.10.15 (Beta Testing)

•
Beta 0.10.15 [[Dec 1st, 2025]]

Desktop app and Android App download link: https://github.com/logseq/logseq/releases/tag/0.10.15

• [[Fixed issues]]

• Fix: Youtube embeds not working

• [[Enhancement]]

• Bump Electron to 38.4.0

Desktop/Android APP 0.10.14 (Beta Testing)

Highlights:

• Bump pdf.js to 4.2.67, thanks to https://github.com/Th-o-mas

Security vulnerability (GHSA-92h5-2358-7xjv) with remote code execution has been closed.

• fix: match paste of x.com links for twitter #12043

Desktop/Android APP 0.10.13 (Beta Testing)

Fix: Youtube embeds not working #12031

Desktop/Android APP 0.10.12 (Beta Testing)

•
Beta 0.10.12 [[May 26th, 2025]]

Desktop app and Android App download link: https://github.com/logseq/logseq/releases/tag/0.10.12

• [[Fixed issues]]

• App freeze, high CPU/GPU usage, and frequent diff prompts #11880

• High CPU consumption #11874

• Using GTK 2/3 and GTK 4 in the same process is not supported #11873

• App crashes on Mac

Desktop/Android APP 0.10.11 (Beta Testing)

• Includes all changes from Beta 0.10.10 [[May 7th, 2025]] and fixes major regressions with it.

• [[Fixed Issues]]

• Images and themes not working #11486

• Global search in blocks not working #11851

• NOTE: You may need to run the command Rebuild search index for this fix.

• Drag and drop of pdfs not working #11850

• [[Enhancement]]

• Upgrade Electron to 36.2.0

Full Changelog: 0.10.9...0.10.11
